description_long: This is a sleek, modern coupe car with a dark metallic finish and a streamlined, aerodynamic body. The front features a prominent grille with a chrome accent and sharp, angular headlights, giving it an assertive appearance. The side profile reveals two doors, flush door handles, and sporty black alloy wheels, emphasizing its performance-oriented design. The rear is characterized by narrow taillights, a subtle integrated spoiler, and a clean bumper, all contributing to a refined yet sporty look. The windows are tinted and the roofline gently slopes towards the rear, typical of a fastback coupe. The overall build suggests a luxury vehicle, likely constructed with a combination of metal, glass, and plastic components.
description: A dark metallic, luxury coupe car with a streamlined fastback profile, chrome-accented grille, and sporty black wheels. Features two doors, tinted windows, and a subtle rear spoiler.
description_view_0: Front view showing the chrome-accented grille, angular headlights, and a wide, assertive stance.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the two-door coupe design, black alloy wheels, and gently sloping roofline.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying narrow taillights, integrated spoiler, and clean bumper design.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the coupe's proportions, window configuration, and sporty wheels.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
